craigslist.title: Weekly and Monthly Rates. No Lease, No Credit Check
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 3704 E Irvington Rd, Tucson, AZ 85714 Red Roof Inn Tucson South - Airport is one of the best 100% smoke free budget hotels that is conveniently off of I-10 and is only three miles from the Tucson International Airport (TUS). We are also close to the University of Arizona, Pima County Fairgrounds and Reid Park Zoo. We offer our guests free Verified Wi-Fi, outdoor pool open year round (daily 7am to 6pm), a guest coin laundry facility and a free expanded cable package featuring HBO. Red Roof Inn Tucson South - Airport is a pet-friendly hotel. craigslist.title: Clubhouse, Spa, Swimming Pool, Parking
craigslist.full_address: 3201 E Fort Lowell Rd, Tucson, AZ
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Deerfield Village 3201 E Fort Lowell Rd, Tucson, AZ, 85716 Call Now - show contact info x 83 OR Text 83 to show contact info to text our leasing team. More unit details at: https://avenue5.aptfeatures.com/eslecy Deerfield Village on Fort Lowell 2 bedroom | 2 bath | 763 square feet Features ✓  Individual Domestic Hot Water - Electric ✓  Private Balcony/Patio ✓  Cox Quick Connect - 1 Month Free! ✓  Outside Storage ✓  View - Santa Catalina Mountains ✓  Heat Individual - Electric ✓  Individual Air Conditioning ✓  Vaulted Ceilings Available* ✓  Tub and Shower Enclosures - Unitized Fiberglass Community Features ✓  BILT Rewards ✓  Monitored Security Available ✓  Clubhouse ✓  Spa ✓  Laundry Facilities ✓  Parking ✓  High Speed Internet Access - Cox/Qwest ✓  Swimming Pool ✓  Fitness Center ✓  Major Street Exposure - Fort Lowell Road Community Info Live Comfortably at Deerfield Village on Fort Lowell. Situated in charming northern Tucson, Arizona, Deerfield Village on Fort Lowell offers all the perks of urban living without the hassles of city life. Our ideal location places you only minutes from a wide selection of delicious eateries, retail options, and entertainment venues. Enjoy the convenience of close proximity to the University of Arizona and Pima Community College. Everything you need is just beyond your front door! Pet Policy Maximum Number of Pets: 2 Maximum Weight: 50 pounds per pet Pet Rent: $35 per pet Pet Deposit: $300 per pet ($150 is refundable, $150 is nonrefundable) Pet One-Time Fee: $300 per pet ($150 is refundable, $150 is nonrefundable) Breed Restrictions: Doberman Pinchers, Chow Chows, Rottweilers, all wolf breeds, Pit Bull Terriers, Staffordshire Terrier, German Shepherds, Presa Canarios, Akitas, Mastiffs, Cane Corsos, Alaskan Malamutes, Siberian Huskies, and any Hybrid or Mixed Breed of one of the aforementioned breeds. We allow some exotic species and other types of pets. Our leasing staff can provide you with details. Office Hours Monday-Friday: 8:30AM-5:30PM Equal Housing Opportunity VHTi8p5hCI
